hero.subtitle: Custom web application design and development. Specialized in creating fast, secure, and visually appealing digital experiences with modern technologies like Node.js.

about.subtitle: 01 // About Me
about.bio2: with a strong passion for continuous learning and improving within the Full Stack ecosystem.
about.bio3: I consider myself a problem-solver and a strong team player. My recent international experience in Italy allowed me to collaborate on industrial monitoring projects, providing practical solutions in real-world environments. My goal is to continue adding value by building useful and well-structured applications.
